_README: TEMPLATE roster for aasetup_all.sh. Copy it to users.json (which is gitignored) and edit with your real users/keys:  cp template-users.json users.json . Field map: user->-u, uid/gid->-U/-G, gecos->USER_GECOS, git_name->-n, git_email->-e, sudo_nopasswd->DO_SUDO_NOPASSWD, public_key->SSH_AUTHORIZED_KEY (login key; "" to skip). enabled=false skips a user. on_exists controls existing accounts: "skip" (leave untouched) or "setup" (configure env only, no create/password). Entries starting with TEMPLATE are examples to copy or delete.

users.gecos: Existing account, set up environment only
